scripts.dev: concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "Backend,Frontend" -c "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "Backend,Frontend" -c "cyan,magenta" "npm start --prefix backend" "npm run preview --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
